title: DR. KC LALMALSAWMZAUVA, ADVISER TO C.M. IN TUIRIAL SCC LEH SAIRANG SAWHTHING SAWNGBAWLNA HMUN ATANGIN SAWHTHING A VAI LIAM
content:
604/2026-2027

Aizawl; the 19th may,2026:Vawiin khan Dr. K.C. Lalmalsawmzauva, Adviser to Chief Minister chuan Tuirial Secondary Collection Centre(SCC) atanga kumin chhunga sawhthing hralhchhuah hnuhnung ber phur a vai liam hnuah, handholding Scheme hnuaia Sawhthing processing plant, Sairang atangin  a  vawikhatna tur leh a hmasa ber atan sawhthing  sawngbawl sa ( Slice dried Ginger) 5MT phur Lirthei a vai liam leh bawk.

Tuirial SCC atanga kumin atana sawhthing thawnchhuah hnuhnung ber tur phur Lirthei a vai liamna programme tawiah hian thu sawiin; Adviser to C.M. Pu KC Lalmalsawmzauva  chuan Tuirial SCC enkawl tu ten hetiang programme buatsaihna chang an hria chu lawmawm a tih thu leh engmah harsatna leh buaina awm lova Tuirial SCC atanga Sawhthing hralhchhuah hnuhnung ber phur lirthei vai liam thei a nih hian, Tuirial SCC buaipuitute thawhrimna leh inpekna nasat zia a lang a,  Tuirial SCC viltu Society hruaitu te, a bik takin Official te an pocketa lut ve tur nilo, kuthnathawktu te hmangaih vang leh sawrkar programme a nih avanga rinawm leh taima taka an mawhphurhna an hlen chu ropui a ti thu a sawi.

Sawhthing man man zawk leh mumal taka hralh a nih theih nan hian Primary Collection Centre (PCC), Secondary Collection Centre (SCC), Mizoram Agricultural Marketing Board (MAMB) leh District Agricultural Marketing Committee (DAMC) te hi inbe pawp rengin, an thawhho thatna leh inpekna vang liau liau a tun dinhmun thleng thei an ni tih sawiin, rinawm tak leh tha taka an hna an hlen theuh thei  chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi  bawk.

Pu KC-a chuan Sawhthing market kan kalpui mekah hian mawlmang  taka thil kalpui kan tum lo a, Research-based a kalpui kan nih avangin tum mumal tak nen year-wise target neiin hma kan la mek a , chung kan hmachhawp te chu:-First Phase (2024-2025): Bul tan kum leh insiamrem kum (Year of system formation) ah kan puang a. Second Phase (2026-2027): A sawngbawlna uar kum  (Year of Processing & Value addition) ah kan puang a. Third Phase (2027-2028): Hmun ngheta chin leh Organic uar zawka kalpui (Year of Sustainable Cultivation and Organic/Natural Farming) kumah kan puang a ni, tiin an hmalak dan tur leh hmachhawp te sawifiahna hun a hmang a. Mizoram a kan sawhthing thar in hmun hla tak tak a thleng ta chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, kalkhawm te zingah sawhthing sawngbawl dan tura ngaihdan tha zawk nei te an awm anih chuan sawrkar hnena thurawn pe hreh lo turin a chah nghal bawk a ni.

Pu Lalhmingmuana, Managing Director, MAMB in  kumina sawhthing lei leh hralh tawh dan report pe in, Mizoram chhungah sawhthing quintal 82972.10 chu support price pek tawh anih thu sawiin, hemi atan hian pawisa  ₹22,25,78,995 pek chhuah tawh anih thu a tarlang a,  Sawrkarin thlai thar doletna tur support price atan a  dah vaibelchhe ₹150  atangin vaibelchhe ₹40 vel chauh hman a nih thu sawiin, sawrkar sum tam tak hum ani chu lawmawm a tih thu a tarlang bawk a ni.

Tuirial SCC  hnuaiah hian PCC 9 awmin, Tuirial SCC atang hian sawhthing  1,42,902.9Kg  hralhchhuah niin, ₹ 25/Kg in 22559.2Kg, ₹22/Kg in 62,704 Kg , ₹40/Kg in 17,604 leh ₹ 50.50 in 40035.7Kg te hralhchhuah a ni. Sawrkarin  sawhthing 1,42,902.9Kg  a do let nana sum sen zat chu ₹34,75,899.2 a ni.

Adviser to C.M. Pu KC Lalmalsawmzauva  hian  Turial SCC atanga sawhthing hralhchhuah hnuhnung ber phurtu Lirthei a vai liam zawh hnu hian  kumin January thlaa Chief Minister in a hawn  tak Sairanga sawhthing processing plant-a   Good Faith Company in an sawhthing sawngbawl hmasak ber (slice dried ginger) 5MT chu a vailiam leh nghal a ni.

Slice Dried Ginger vai liamna programme tawiah hian thu sawiin Pu KC Lalmalsawmzauva chuan Handholding hnuaia processing unit atanga thla 4 chhung leka an product hmasa ber 5 MT vai liam theih a ni chu thil chhinchhiah tlak tak a ni  tiin, an thawpui  Good Faith leh Slice Dried Ginger leitu company  Nature Sampann te bakah a processing khawihtu entrepreneur te chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk.  Vawiin ni thleng tura an in dawrna zawng zawng leh hma an lakna, experience te chu midang share ve turin a chah a.

Pu KC-a chuan a process-ah hmabak an la ngah thu leh fimkhur ngai lai tam tak a la awm thu te, FSSAI registration leh chemical test te paltlang a ngai thu te leh a phur nazawng tih chi a niloa, mi duhtui, ti tak tak leh thalai lehkha thiam te tih chi a ni thu a sawi a. Mizo thalai lehkha thiamte lo pen chhuak a, sawhthing chauh nilo vegetable processing lama uar zawka hma la turin a sawm bawk a ni.

title: LOK SABHA MP PU RICHARD VANLALHMANGAIHA HOVIN KHAWZAWL-AH DISTRICT DEVELOPMENT COORDINATION & MONITORING COMMITTEE (DISHA) MEETING NEIH A NI
content:
603/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 19th May 2026 :Vawiin khan District Development Coordination & Monitoring Committee (DISHA) meeting chu Mizoram Lok Sabha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha, DISHA Chairman hov in DC Conference Hall-ah neih a ni a, he hun hi Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana, DISHA Member Secretary ni bawk chuan a kaihruai.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lok Sabha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan thu sawiin, mipuite hmasawn nana Sawrkar laipui scheme pawimawh tak tak duante kalpui a nih dan leh an hnathawte inhriatpui tawn nan DISHA meeting hi neih thin a ni, a ti a. District hmasawnna tur ngaihtuah turin he meeting-a kalkhawmte hian mawhphurhna lian tan an nei tih sawiin, district tan thahnemngai taka thawk zel turin a chah a. Department hrang hrang hotute inhmuhkhawm a har thin avangin vawiin meeting hi hmang tangkaia an hnathawhte inhriatpuia, thawhho theihna laite pawh ngaihtuaha sawiho turin a fuih bawk a. Department hrang hrang hnathawh leh hmalaknate chu tha a tih thu sawiin, district tana an inpekna avangin lawmthu a sawi.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian SDO Pu Chandrakant Bagoria hnen atangin Sawrkar laipui Scheme hrang hrang hmalaknate ngaihthlak a ni a. Head of Office-ten an department theuh hmalaknate sawifiahin, zawhna awmte an chhang a, hmachhawp an neihte leh harsatna an neihte sawiho nghal a ni a. MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan an harsatnate sawrkar laipui hotute hnenah a thlensak tur thu sawiin, Scheme hrang hrang hnuaia hamthatna dawngtu turte (beneficiary) uluk taka thlang turin a fuih a. DISHA meeting hnuhnung bera an thu relte bawhzuina dinhmun thlirho a ni bawk.

DISHA hi district hrang hranga sawrkar laipui scheme hmalakna viltu Committee a nih bakah Department hrang hrangte inkara thawhho dan tur ngaihtuah leh thawhhona tha siam tura din a ni a. Vawiinah hian Department hrang hrang Rural development, Education, Agiculture, Horticulture, Social Welfare, Health & Family Welfare, Lead District Manager, DUDO, Commerce & Industries, PHE, PWD, DCSO, CDPO leh VC hruaitute an tel a ni.

title: Home Minister hoin HPC-D(LF) Charter of Demands ngaihtuah
content:
602/2026-2027

Aizawl the 19th May, 2026:Vawiin May ni 19, 2026(Thawhlehni) Chhun dar 12:30 khan Home Minister Pu K Sapdanga hovin Mizoram Sawrkar leh HPC-D(LF) te Inremna thuthlung (Memorandum of Settlement) in a ken tel, Charter of Demands-a tarlan point hrang hrangte tihhlawhtlin dan tur leh a bawhzui dan tur relin Home Department Official te an thukhawm.

Charter of Demands-ah hian Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate hova HPC-D Cadre inpe tate intundinna tur mai ni lo, Hmar tlang dung huap hmasawnna tur rawtna tha tak tak a tel a. Inkalpawhna tha siamte, mipui mamawh tak tak - Zirna in tha leh Sawrkar Office din belh te leh lo neia eizawngte tana chhenfakawm, Agro-based industries din leh a dangte a tel a ni.

Meeting chuan HPC-D(LF) te mamawh leh ngenna hrang hrangte chu uluk taka thlir nawnin Department hrang hrang kaihhnawih thil a nih hlawm avangin, a changtu Department theuhvah hma lak thuai a nih theih nan lehkhaa thlen ni se, an ti a. A theih ang anga bawhzuiin hmalakna report pawh dil khawma thlirho leh thuai ni se an ti bawk.

Meeting-ah hian Adviser to CM (Pol) Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, Home Secretary leh Home Department Officerte bakah,  Sr. SP, CID(SB) te an tel bawk.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB DISTRICT MAGISTRATE IN AFRICAN SWINE FEVER (ASF) LAKA INVEN NAN THUPEK A CHHUAH
content:
601/2026-2027

Kolasib, 19th May, 2026:Mizoram chhung District thenkhatah African Swine Fever (ASF) hri a len thar leh mek avangin, he hri hlauhawm tak laka Kolasib District-a vawkvulhtute leh mipuite kan him tlan zel theih nan Kolasib District Magistrate Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Section 163 of Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023 in thuneihna a pek angin vawiin ni 19 May, 2026 ah hian a hnuaia mi ang hian thupek a chhuah:

1. Ram dang leh State dang atangin Vawk, Vawksa, Frozen Pork, Vawksa rep leh vawksa atanga siam reng reng lak luh khap tlat a ni.

2. Mizoram chhunga District dang atangin Vawk, Vawksa, Frozen Pork, Vawksa rep leh vawksa atanga siam reng reng lak luh khap tlat a ni.

3. ASF hrilenna (infected area) puanna khua atangin Vawk, Vawksa, Frozen Pork, Vawksa rep leh vawksa atanga siam reng reng lak chhuah khap tlat a ni.

4. Vawk damlo reng reng talh leh hralh khap tlat a ni. Vawk thi reng reng paih mai mai lovin thuk takah chinai nena phum bo thin tur a ni.

5. Vawk damlo leh thi an awmin, AH & Vety. Official te hnenah hriattir vat tur a ni.

6. Hri lenna hmun (ASF infected area) atanga hri a darh zel loh nan Vawk suat duh ten AH & Vety. Dept. ah dilna thehluh tur a ni.

He thupek hian chhuah a nih atanga ni 60 chhung a huam ang a, dan bawhchhia an awm chuan Section 223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 hmangin hrem an ni ang.

title: KHAWZAWLAH ‘JAN BHAGIDARI – SABSE DOOR, SABSE PEHLE’ PROGRAMME HAWNNA NEIH A NI
content:
600/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 19th May, 2026 :Nimin khan Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah ‘Jan Bhagidari – Sabse Door, Sabse Pehle’ hawnna inkhawm neih a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan sawrkarin mipuite hmasawnna tura scheme a ruahmante a dawngtu tur dik takin an dawn theih nan inhrilhhriatna zau zawk kalpui a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Department hrang hrang hotute chu mipui tamzawkin an tana duan hamthatnate an dawn theih nan chak taka hma la zel turin a chah.

Jan Bhagidari – Sabse Door, Sabse Pehle" (Mipui telna – A hla ber hnenah, A hmasa berah) tih hi PM-JANMAN leh DAJGUA scheme hnuaia sawrkai laipui programme a ni a. Hmasawnna rualkhai a thlen theih nana, hmun kilkhawr leh hla zawka awm, a bikin tribal-te hnena sawrkar scheme hrang hrang hnuaia hamthatna thlen tumna programme a ni a. May ni 18-25 thleng neih tura ruahman niin, Khawzawl district chhung khaw hrang hrangah kalpui tur a ni.

title: STATE LEVEL SUB-COMMITTEE ON GREEN MIZORAM AN THUKHAWM
content:
599/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 19th May 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Environment, Forests & Climate Change (EF&CC) Department Minister Pu Lalthansanga kaihruaiin Chief Wildlife Warden Conference Hall, Khatlaah State Level Sub-Committee (SLSC) on Green Mizoram an thukhawm.

Thutkhawmnaah hian kumina Green Mizoram Day (GMD) hman dan tur rel a ni a. Kumin GMD thupui atan “Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, nunna tinreng bul a ni.” (Trees are green gold, The roots of all life) tih chu thlan a ni. Ramchhunga a lawmna pui ber (State level function) chu Youth Recreation Centre, Falkland ah June 11, 2026 zing dar 10-a hman tura rel a ni a. Thutkhawmah hian kum liam ta chhunga hmalakna hrang hrang te thlirhona neih a ni bawk.

Minister Pu Lalthansanga chuan thu sawiin ramngaw hlutzia leh humhalh a tulzia a sawi a. Thing phun lama tan kan lak nasat em em rualin a enkawl zelna kawngah tih tur a la tam hle a. Sawrkar leh mipuiten mawhphurhna sang tak kan nei a ni a ti.

EF&CC Principal Secretary Pu Sudhir Kumar pawhin Mizoram chu India rama ramngaw nei tha ber a nih rualin, a hlutna kan hriat thar a pawimawh hle a ni a ti bawk.

He hunah hian EF&CC Department Official-te, State Council of Educational Research & Training(SCERT), Local Administration Department(LAD), Land Revenue & Settlement Department, Public Works Department(PWD), Information & Public Relations Department(I&PR), National Service Scheme (NSS), Central YMA, Mizo Hmeichhe Insuihkhawm Pawl(MHIP), Mizoram Upa Pawl(MUP), Local Council Association, Association for Environmental Preservation (ASEP), Science Teachers’ Association Mizoram (STAM), Centre for Environment Protection (CEP), Green Mizoram Network, Mizoram Florists’ Association, leh Save Environment Association (SENVA) aiawhte an tel a. Pu Samson Thanruma, DCF (HQ) in lawmthu sawiin vawiin hun hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER ATTENDS THANKSGIVING FUNCTION AT HMUNPUI
content:
93/2026-2027

Hmunpui, 19 May 2026:Chief Minister Lalduhoma today attended a thanksgiving function organised by the people of Hmunpui to celebrate the completion of the village’s new blacktopped road, the newly constructed Health Sub-Centre and staff quarters, and the allotment of 24 hectares of rubber plantation under the Chief Minister’s Rubber Mission. Local MLA H. Lalzirliana accompanied him.

Addressing the gathering, the Chief Minister said the road had been reconstructed under SASCI 2025–26 Part-I at a cost of Rs. 3 crore after the earlier PMGSY road required urgent repairs.

He also highlighted the objectives of the Chief Minister’s Rubber Mission, launched after studying Tripura’s successful model. Under the scheme, the government aims to plant over 51 lakh rubber saplings across 11,500 hectares over five years. Hmunpui received 24 hectares under the second phase of the programme.

The Chief Minister said the new Health Sub-Centre and staff quarters, funded under NABARD RIDF-30, were constructed to strengthen healthcare services in the village. Describing Hmunpui as an important village, he assured continued government support and informed that a survey for a new power supply line is currently underway.

MLA H. Lalzirliana thanked the Chief Minister and appreciated the developmental progress achieved in the village under the present government.

Speaking on behalf of the villagers, Village Council Vice President Pu H. Lalduhsanga expressed gratitude for the new road, healthcare facilities, and rubber-based livelihood opportunities provided to 24 families under the Rubber Mission.

Attachment

title: Ruihhlo do beihpui thlak dan review meeting
content:
597/2026-2027Dated Aizawl, the 19th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga leh Excise & Narcotics Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar te kaihhruaiin ruihhlo do beihpui thlak dan review meeting Home Minister pisaah neih a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Home Department, Excise and Narcotics Department, Food and Drugs Administration leh Central YMA hruaitute bakah Aizawl DC leh SP te kokim takin an tel a. Mizoram chhunga ruihhlo do kawnga hma latu hrang hrang kalkhawm hian ruihhlo zuartute, ngawlveite leh ruihhlo zawrhleh inhlanchhawn dan kawng hrang hrang te an sawiho a. Ruihhlo do leh a hmang sualtute leh a zuartute laka beihpuithlak chhunzawm zel dan tur ruahmanna hrang hrang an ngaihtuah a ni.

Tun dinhmunah Mizoram-ah ruihhlo chi hrang hrang – heroin te, khuh damdawi chi hrang hrang te, ganja leh ruihhlo dangte a hluar hle a. Aizawl bikah café culture uar thar avangin thalaite zingah ruihtheih thil hmanna a hluar phah hle ni a hriat a ni bawk.

A bik takin tun hnaiah khuh damdawi (cough syrup) te hi dan ang thlapin Dak In (post office) kaltlangin Mizoram chhungaha lo lut hnem hle tih hriat a ni a. Hemi chungchanga hma lakdan turte pawh chipchiar taka sawiho a ni.

Mizoram pumah September, 2025 thla atang khan Ruihhlo Do beihpui hi thlak tan a ni a, Operation Jericho tia hming vuah a ni. Vawiin meeting-ah hian Operation Jericho a hlawhtlin thungaihthlak a ni a, tha thlah lova kal zel tha tih tlan a ni.

Ruihhlo do kawngah hian Mizoram Police leh Excise Department a thawktute chu Central YMA hnuaia Central Anti-Drug Squad (CADS) ten ngawrh takin an thawhpui zel a.Sawrkar lam atang pawhin sawrkar hnathawkte tha tihchakmai bakah tlawmngai pawlte tha tichak zel turin hma lakchhunzawm zel ni se tih a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: SAITUALAH SPECIAL INTENSIVE REVISION 2026  ATAN TRAINING BUATSAIH
content:
596/2026-2027

Saitual, the 19th May, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah, Saitual District-a Field Level Officials te tan Special Intensive Revision 2026 training buatsaih a ni.

He hunah hian District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan inlawmna thu a sawi a, Special Intensive Revision 2026 atana training buatsaih a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, mawhphurhna nei zawng zawng te chu theih tawp chhuah turin a chah a ni.

Vawiin training-ah hian Pi F. Lalnisai, State Level Master Trainer chuan SIR chungchang leh a tangkaina te, SIR 2026 atanga schedule te leh kalpui dan tur te, training pek dan te, Enumeration form chungchang te, ERO, AERO leh BLO mawhphurhna te a tarlang a ni.

Training-ah Pu Srinivas Sadi, DC & District Election Officer, Pu Lallawmawma, Addl. DC & ERO, 21-Lengteng, Pu V. Laldinsanga, Project Director & ERO, 8-Chalfilh, Pu Tharun Patnaik Madala, SDO (S)& ERO, 9-Tawi, Pi Mary L. Rodinpuii, Election Officer, Pu J. Lalhmahruaia, BDO Phullen & AERO, 8-Chalfilh, Pu J. Lalawmpuia, SDC Saitual & AERO, 9-Tawi, Pu R. Vanlalfaka, SDC Saitual, Pi F. Zodingpui,i DIPRO Saitual te an tel a ni.

Special Intensive Revision (SIR) kalpui dan tur tlangpui te:

1. Special Intensive Revision ah chuan Electoral Roll hi a thar hlaka buatsaih tur a ni.

2. Chutihrual chuan tuna Electoral Roll kan hman mek leh kum 2005-a Mizorama Intensive Revision kan neihtuma Electoral Roll behchhan tur a ni ang. Tuna electoral roll hman meka hming chuang ten enumeration form hmangin electoral roll-a ziahluh an dil thei ang a. Enumeration Form thehlut zingah kum 2005 Intensive Revision electoral roll-a hming la chuang lo emaw an detail inmil lo te chuan an nihna tih chianna document an thehluh leh a ngai dawn a ni.

3. Electoral Roll siam thar turah hian Enumeration Form hmangin hming ziah luh dilna thehluh tur a ni a, tuna Electoral Roll kan hman lai meka hming chuang ten Enumeration Form hi thehluh tur a ni.

4. Electoral roll hmanlai meka hming chuang lo te erawh in Form 6 hmangin Electoral roll-a hming ziahluh an dil a ngai ang.

5. Enumeration Form hi BLO/Booth Level Agent (BLA) ten in tinah an sem ang a, dahkhah hnuah BLO ten anla khawm leh ang.

6. Enumeration Form thehlutte chuan an EPIC ngai an ring thei ang a, EPIC thar pek chhuah an ngai lovang. (Hemi chungchangah hian Election Commission of India chuan thuthar a neih leh neih loh ngaihchan a ni)

7. A hun chhunga Enumeration Form thehlut lo erawh chuan Form-6 hmangin Electoral Roll-a hming ziah luhthar an dil a ngai dawn a, EPIC thar pek an ni ang a/ an EPIC number ngai an ring thei lovang.

8. Enumeration Form thehluh rual hian document engmah thil tel a ngai lovang.

9. ERO chuan Enumeration Form thehluttu zawng zawng hming chuanna draft Electoral Roll a buatsaihin a tichhuak ang a, hemi copy hi Electoral Registration Officer (ERO)/Asst. Electoral Registration Officer (AERO) office ah leh District Election Officer/DC office_ah en theihin a awm ang.

10. ERO-in uluk taka Enumeration Form-te a enfiah hnuah Enumeration Form thehlut zingah SIR neih hnuhnung ber Electoral Roll-a an detail (anmahni emaw an chhungte) awmlo emaw inmillo an awm chuan ERO-in notice a pe ang a, ERO hmaah hearing neih tur ni.

11. Hearing-ah mahni nihna (detail) tih chian nan a hnuai ami ang hian document thehluh tur a ni

Ni 01.07.1987 hma lama India-a piang tan

•A hnuaia list atang hian document eng pawh mahni pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur document thehluh tur

India ramah Ni. 01.07.0978 leh 02.12.2004 inkara piang

•A hnuaia list atang hian mahni document eng pawh pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur thehluh tur

•A hnuaia list atang hian nu emaw pa emaw document eng pawh pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur document thlang rawh

Ni. 02.12.2004 hnu lamah India rama piang

•A hnuaia list atang hian mahni document eng pawh, pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur document thehluh tur

•A hnuaia list atang hian document eng pawh, mahni pa pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur document thehluh tur

•A hnuaia list atang hian document eng pawh, mahni nu pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur document thehluh tur

•Nu emaw Pa emaw Indian an nih loh chuan i pian laia an Passport copy thehluh tur

India ram pawn piang tan (Ram pawna India Mission-in Birth Registration a pek chhuah finfiahna thil tur)

Registration/Naturalization hmangin India khua leh tui nihna nei tan. (Certificate of Registration of Citizenship thehluh tur)

1. Document thehluh theih te –

i.Central/State Sorkar/PSU eng pawha regular employee/pensioner hnena Identity

ii.Card/Pension Payment Order pek chhuah apiang.

iii.Sawrkar hnuaia Bank/Post Office/LIC/PSU ten 01.07.1987 hmaa Identity Card emaw

iv.Certificate emaw Document emaw an pek chhuah

v.Thuneitute hnen atanga Birth Certificate pek chhuah

vi.Passport

vii.Board/University pawrnpui Matriculation/Educational certificate

viii.Permanent Residence Certificate state thuneitute hnen atanga pek chhuah

ix.Forest Right Certificate

x.OBC/SC/ST certificate emaw thuneituten an pek chhuah caste certificate eng pawh

xi.National Registration of Citizens (a awmna apiangah)

xii.Family Register, State/TuaIchhungthuneitute buatsaih

xiii.(Xi) Sawrkar-in ram/in a pekna certificate eng pawh

xiv.Aadhaar card (citizenship proof nan ni lovin mahni identity tih chian nan chauh hman theih a ni)

xv.Kum 2005-a Mizorama Intensive Revision neih tuma Electoral Roll-a hming chuanna phek (2005 Electoral Roll hiwww.ceomizoram.gov.inah a hmuh theih).

Attachment

title: DEPUTY SPEAKER PU LALFAMKIMA'N BAIRABI LEH PANGBALKAWNAH ZIRLAI TITHA CHAWIMAWINA A HMANPUI
content:
596/2026-2027

Kolasib, 19th May, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar khan Mizoram Legislative Assembly Deputy Speaker leh Kolasib bialtu MLA ni bawk, Pu Lalfamkima chuan MZP Sub-Headquarters, Bairabi ten YMA Hall, Bairabi North-a Mizo Zirlai Titha Chawimawina an buatsaih a hmanpui a.

Hemi hnu hian Pangbalkawnah zirlai titha chawimawina hun a hmanpui leh nghal a ni.

He hunah hian Deputy Speaker Pu Lalfamkima chuan thu sawiin, zirlaiten an hmabak an thlirnaah mahni inhriatchian a ngaih thu a sawi a. Thiante tih ang ti ve ringawt lovin, mahni tuina leh thahnemngaihna zawng thlan thiam a pawimawh a, pawisa tam lam aiin mahni tuina zawnah chuan hlawhtlinna pawh a hnai zawk thin a ni, a ti. Thian kawm fimkhur a tul thu chahin, degree ringawt aiin thiamna tak tak (quality education) neih a pawimawh zia a tarlang a. Tunlai changkanna leh AI (Artificial Intelligence) khawvelin min tuam mek laia heng zirna leh hriatna tizautu tur hmanruate hi tangkai taka hmang tur leh, a tha zawnga hmang hram hram turin zirlaite a chah a ni.

He hunah hian MZP Sub-Headquarters, Bairabi Secretary hnen atangin report ngaihthlak a ni a. Bairabi-ah hian kum 1998 khan BSU Branch anga awm tanin, kum 2000 atang khan MZP Sub-Headquarters an lo nih tak thu tarlan a ni. Zirlaite leh khawtlang tana an hmalakna hrang hrangte tarlangin, sikulah te kangmei ven chungchang awareness an pek thin thu leh, ramri humhalh (Inner line reserve) kawngah endikna tha zawk neih a nih theih nan DC leh MZP General Headquarters-a thlen ngaite an thlen thin thu a sawi a. Hnam dang hnathawk leh sumdawngte permit endik hna an thawh thin bakah, sikul hrang hranga mamawh bungrua (thuthleng, dawhkan, lectern leh silpauline) te an sem thin thu tarlan a ni. Zirlai harsatna tawk leh chhiat tawkte tanpuina vehbur khawnin an hlan thin a, board exam hmachhawntute tlawhkualin an mamawh te an lo ngaihvensak thin a ni. Harsatna neite tan MZP chu belh theihin an awm reng thu leh, admission leh form buaipui ngaihah te zirtirtute nena tangtlangin zirlaite puih hna an thawk thin a ni.

Hemi hnu hian Deputy Speaker Pu Lalfamkima chuan Pangbalkawnah zirlai titha chawimawina a hmanpui leh a. Zirlai hlawhtlinna changte lawmpuina hlanin, an hma hunah theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin a fuih . Tun hmaa zirna kal dan leh tun hun inang lo chho ta zel chu tarlangin, class 10 (matric) pass pawhin hlutna nei hle thin mah se tunah chuan a aia sâng zir zel a ngai tawh a. Hlawhtlinna lo chan chhoh zelah pawh indah sang mai lova, hawihhawm taka hmalam pan zel turin zirlaite a chah a ni.

Mihringte hian kan hma hun kan hriat lawk loh avangin kan awh ngawih ngawih te pawhin nakinah chuan min la awt ve thei a ni tih hria a, belhchian dawl leh thiamna tak tak (quality education) nei turin tan lak a ngai a ni, a ti a. Hna sang leh hniam bik a awm loh thu leh, eng hna pawh thawk ila taima leh awhawm taka thawh theih a pawimawh thu a sawi. Social media leh thiamna lo thang chho zelah zirna puitu tur hmanrua (AI kaihhnawih) te kan bul hnaiah awlsam taka hmuh theih a nih tawh avangin hengte hi tangkai taka hmang thiam turin a chah a. Mizoram Youth Commission (MYC) kaltlangin ram pawn thlenga hna thawk turin kawng a awm tawh zia sawiin, rilru fim tak pu a hmabak thlir turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB-AH VOHBIKTE TANA HMUNHMA BUATSAIH DAN COMMISSIONER , PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES HOVA ULUK TAKA ENFIAH A NI
content:
595/2026-2027

Kolasib, 19th May, 2026:Vawiin chawhma atang khan Pi Vanlaldiki Sailo, Commissioner, Persons with Disabilities (PwD) chuan Kolasib khawpui huamchhunga sawrkar hmunhma hrang hrangte tlawhin, rualbanlote (vohbikte) tana awlsam zawka luh chhuah theihna (Access Audit) an siam dan te a hmunah a enfiah. Vawiin khan DC Office, District Hospital (Civil Hospital), Govt. Kolasib College, St. John's Higher Secondary School leh Home for the Blind School te a tlawh a ni.

Heng hmunhmate a enfiahnaah hian Commissioner Pi Vanlaldiki Sailo chuan, vohbikte chuan ngaihsak an mamawh bik thu a tarlang a. "Pianphunga rualbanloten pangngai taka nun an hman ve theih nan, a tulna apiangah kan tanpui a ngai hle a ni," a ti. Vawiina fuke kim tha tak te pawh hi nakinah chuan ramtuileilova la awm thei reng kan nih thu a sawi. Sawrkar laipui duh dan angin, sawrkar pisaah te, zirna inah te, Biak In leh vantlang mipui punkhawmna hmunah te rualbanlote (vohbikte) tana hman awlsam tur hmunhma kan buatsaih a tul hle a ni, a ti bawk.

Ram changkang apiangah vohbikte an ngaihsak zual thu tarlangin, Pi Vanlaldiki chuan an tana hamthatna awm thei ang angte hmuh chhuahsak a, an theihna te sawrkarin a chhawr tangkai thin thu a sawi a. Mizoramah pawh vohbikte tana luh chhuah leh hman nuam tur hmunhma (accessible environment) kan siamsak ngei chu a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti.

Mizoramah pawh Office of the Commissioner, Persons with Disabilities hmalaknain ni 21 February, 2025 atang khan 'Access Audit' hi neih tan a ni a. Vawiin May ni 19, 2026 hian Kolasib District hmun pawimawh tak tak - DC Office, District Hospital, Govt. Kolasib College, St. John’s Higher Secondary School leh The Salvation Army hnuaia Home for the Blind ah te endikna hi neih a ni. Mizoram chhungah district 9 ah he programme hi kalpui tawh niin, Mizoram pumpuiah endikna hi neih chhuah vek tum a ni.

Sawrkar laipui chuan India rama rualbanlote hamthatna tura a duan pakhat 'Accessible India Campaign' hnuaiah Access Audit hi a ngai pawimawh em em a. Rualbanloten khawi hmun pawh harsa lova an thlen ve theih nan - wheelchair hmangte, mitdelte leh a dangte tan, mipui punkhawmna vantlang building hrang hrang, Biak In, sawrkar pisa, zirna in leh a dangte chu siam rem ngei ngei tur tiin khauh takin thupek a siam a. Hemi bawhzui hian Audit Team te leh rualbanlo aiawhten heng hmunte hi endikin hun an hmang thin a, India ram pumpuiah Access Audit hi chak taka kalpui mek a ni.

Vawiina Access Audit neihnaah hian rualbanloten khawilai pawh awlsam taka an thlen theih nan wheelchair hman ngaihna hmunte, mitdelte tana braille tarna hmun siamte, mipui punkhawmna vantlang building hrang hranga an kalvelna tur te endik a ni a. Hmunhma buatsaih dan tur ruahmanna (drawing) hlan nghal a ni bawk. He Access Audit neihnaah hian Pi Lalrinchhani, SDC leh Nodal Officer (PwD) ni bawk te, Pi Lalnunpari Hmar, DPO Women & Child Development, Kolasib, PWD Building Division, District Project Coordinator (Samagra), Special Educator representative, DSW Office aiawh te leh DIPRO Office aiawhten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN HMUNPUI KHAW LAWMTHUSAWINA HMANPUI
content:
594/2026-2027

Hmunpui the 19th May 2026:Vawiin khan Hmunpui khawtlang chuan an khaw kawngpui black top thar te, an khaw Health Sub Centre building leh Quarters thar te, Chief Minister Rubber Mission thawh hnihna atanga an khuain Rubber Hectare 25 chinna an hmuhte lawmna an khaw Community Hall-ah an nei a, Pu Lalduhoma, Chief Minister chuan a telpui. Bialtu MLA Er. H. Lalzirliana'n Chief Minister hi a tawiawm.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, Hmunpui khawtlangin Blacktop kawngpui thar, BC ngata siam in neih avanga in lawmna thusawite ka lo hmu ve a. A hmutu apiangten an lawmpui che u niin ka hria. Kei pawhin ka lawmpui che u a ni.

In khaw kawng hi PMGSY hmanga Cell filled Concrete-a siam a lo ni tawh a, a lo chhiat tak avangin kan sorkar hian SASCI 2025-26 Part 1 atangin cheng vaibelchhe thum (3 Crore) sengin kan siam tha ta a ni.

Kan ramin ruahtui a dawng tam thin a, kan kawngpuite an chhe hma riau a. In khaw kawng pawh hi duat taka in lo enkawl zui loh chuan a tlo lo vang tih a hlauhawmin ka hria.

Chief Minister ka nih tirh khan Rubber Board of India Chairman Dr. Shawar Dhanania chuan min rawn hmu a. Tripura State-in Chief Minister Rubber Mission tha taka an kalpui anga Mizorama kalpui ve tha a tih thu a rawn sawi a. Rubber chin theihna ram hi kan nei tha a, Rubber hi kum 40 thlenga hnai theih a, a hnai tlak tawh loh hnuah Thingzaia hman zui leh theih a ni a. Ramngaw a siam a, tuihna a tipung a, a hralhna a tha bawk si a. Tripura lamah a zirchiang turin official team ka tir thla a. An report-te kan han ngaithla a, kan kalpui ve ta a ni. CM Rubber Mission hmang hian ram Hectare 11500 a zauah Rubber kung nuaih 51 chuang phun thar kan tum a ni.

Kan thawhpui (progress partner) te hi a tirah Hectare khat theuh han pe phawt ila, a tul anga zauh zel theih turin hma lo la se kan ti a. First Phase-ah khan Potential kan neih thatna Mamit leh Kolasib District-ah; Hectare 1,000 a zauah bul kan tan a. Second Phase-ah hian District pariatah Hectare 2,575 a zauah kan kalpui leh ta a. Hmunpui pawhin Hectare 25 in chang ta ni.

In Sub Centre hi sak that a tul hle tih kan hria a. NABARD RIDF 30 hnuaiah kan rawn thun a, tunah chuan a lo puitling ta a. Ka lawmpui hle che u a. Mipuiten tangkai takin in lo hmang dawn nia, tiin a chah.

Hmunpui chu zirna ngaisang khua, khaw taima leh Lengpui Airport khawl pawimawh DVOR bunna hmun a ni a. Khaw pawimawh tak in ni. Sorkar pawhin a theihna apiangah a ngaisak zel dawn che u a, in khaw power supply lakna kalkawng pawh hi a tharin survey kan nei mek a ni, a ti.

Er. H. Lalzirliana, bialtu MLA pawhin thusawiin, Chief Minister-in Hmunpui a tlawhnaa tawiawm turin min sawm avangin ka lawm hle a. A kaihhruai sorkar hnuaia hun reilote chhunga hmasawnna duhawm tak tak Hmunpuiin a hmuh avang pawhin lawmthu ka sawi a ni, a ti a. Khawtlang hmasawn zelna tura hmalak ngai nia a ngaihte a tarlang bawk.

Pu H. Lalduhsanga, Vice President, VC chuan khawtlang aiawha lawmthu sawina a nei a. Metal Road kan la neih ngai miah loh kan nei a, Health Sub Centre leh Quarters thar kan nei a, chhungkaw 24 tan Rubber eizawnna min pe a. Khawtlang mipuite lawmna hi a sang em em a, thil danga kan indaidannate dah thain khawtlang mipuiten he hun hi kan buatsaih a ni, a ti.

Lawmthu sawina inkhawm hi Pu H. Lalkaisara, VCP chuan a kaihruai a, Pi Lalrinkimi'n hunserh a hmang a ni.

title: Siaha ah 'Jan Bhagidaari Abhiyan - Sabse Door, Sabse Pehle' hawnna neih a ni
content:
593/2026-2027

Siaha the 19th May 2026: Janjatiya Garima Utsav 2026 hnuaia peng pakhat  'Jan Bhagidaari Abhiyan - Sabse Door, Sabse Pehle' campaign hawnna chu vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Siaha-ah neih ani.

District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte kaihhruaina hnuaiah he ‘Jan Bhagidaari - Sabse Door, Sabse Pehle' hawnna hi neih a ni a, District chhunga DAJGUA village 27 a kalpui tura ruahman niin, heng khaw hrang hranga kalpui dan tur leh campaign hun chhunga hmalakna tur hrang hrang rel ho nghal a ni.

Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte chuan Jan Bhagidari Abhiyan nihphung leh kalpui dan tur tlangpui sawifiahna a nei a, Ministry of Tribal Affairs hnuaia Tribal te hnam ziarang leh nunphung vawnghima, chawikan chu he campaign thiltum a ni tiin line department te chu tha taka thawhhopuiah a sawm a ni.

Jan Bhagidari- Sabse Door, Sabse Pehle hi Sawrkar Laipuia Ministry of Tribal Affairs chuan ram puma tribal mite hmasawnna ngaituaha a duan niin, he campaign hi May ni 18 leh ni 25 inkara neih tur a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP-AH DISTRICT LEVEL AADHAAR MONITORING COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
592/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 19th May 2026:Vawiin khan District Level Aadhaar Monitoring Committee (DLAMC) chu Serchhip District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma kaihhruainain DC Meeting Hall-ah an thukhawm a. Serchhip District chhunga Aadhaar Enrollment chak zawka kalpui a nih theih dan turte an sawi ho a ni.

He thutkhawmah hian UIDAI Regional Office, Guwahati Assistant Manager Pu Chinmoy Kakatia’n Mizoram pumpui Aadhaar enrollment dinhmun tarlangin Mizoram Projected Population 14,16,000 ah 92.4% te'n Aadhaar an neih tawh thu a sawi a. UIDAI hmalakna thar hrang hrangte tarlangin, tun hnaiah mipui tana hman nuam leh awlsam zawk tur Aadhaar Application thar siam a nih thu leh, naupangte'n kum 5 leh kum 15 an tlinin Mandatory Biometric Update (MBU) an tih ngei ngei a ngaih thute a sawi bawk.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian Serchhip District chhunga chak zawka Aadhaar enrolment kalpui dan tur hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni a. District Nodal Officer hmalakna tur te, Aadhaar enrolment khawl leh system-a buaina (technical issues) awm theite chinfel zung zung a nih dan turte leh Operator indaihlohna leh harsatna dang awm theite, rang taka sutkian a nih theih dan turte rel a ni.

District Level Aadhaar Monitoring Committee thutkhawmah hian Serchhip Superintendent of Police Pu Gavit Gogna, IPS bakah sawrkar department hotute - Health, Education, Lead Bank leh Serchhip district chhunga Aadhaar Operator-te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAIAH SOUTHERN COOPERATORS MEET VAWI - 1 NA NEI
content:
591/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 19th May 2026:Vawiin khan Cooperation Department, Lai Autonomous District Council (LADC) bultumin Southern Cooperators Meet Vawi - 1 na chu LADC Hall-Council Veng, Lawngtlaiah neih a ni a. Pu C. Lalsawmzuala, Chief Executive Member (CEM) LADC chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Pu C. Lalsawmzuala chuan chhimbial atanga Cooperators kalkhawmte chunga lawmthu sawina a nei a.Society-  hlawhtlinna tur chuan rinawmna, taimakna, dawhtheihna leh terei peihna nen beih a ngai ni, a ti a. Mahni hlawhtlinnaah duhtawk mai tur a ni lo a, midangte pawh an hlawhtling ve tur ani tih rilru pu a, midangte tan malsawmna ni a, theihtawp chhuaha  tanrual chu thil pawimawh leh tihmakmawh tak a nih thu a sawi. Cooperative Society chak tak neih a pawimawh thu sawiin, Cooperative movement-  hian ram  economy -  a tih chak a, hna hrang hrang siamin, ram hmasawnna atan thil  pawimawh tak a ni, a ti.

Khuallian chuan Cooperative Society hian Mi mal chak lo zawkte a tanpui a, Loan leh tanpuina sum pawh  awlsam taka dawn theih a nih bawk avangin sum leh pai harsatna  sutkian sakin eizawnna ngelnghet a siam sak thin a, hemi a nih avang hian Society chak tak neih a pawimawh hle a ti a. A bik takin chhimbiala Cooperators - te chu thawkho thiam tur leh intanpui tawn tura fuihin, LADC chuan theihtawp a chhuahpui reng tur thu a tarlang bawk.

Southern Cooperators Meet Vawi - 1 naah hian Thupui atan ' Eizawnna hna tluantling neih nan Cooperative movement tihchak' (Strengthening Cooperative Movement for Sustainable Livelihood) tih  hman a ni a.  Lai Autonomous District Council (LADC), Mara Autonomous District Council ( MADC) leh  Chakma Autonomous District Council (CADC) atangin Cooperative Society - thahnem tak an tel thei a.

Vawiin Southern Cooperators Meet - ah hian thupawimawh tak tak pahnih -

1. Southern Cooperators Meet chu kum tin neih ni se, a thlentu tur chu Organising Commitee - hian rel mai thin nibawk se

2. Mizorama  Cooperative Society hi enizawnna ngelnghet a lo nih theih nan leh Kan Movement ( Cooperative Movement) hi Mizoram puma a lo chak zawk theih nan chhimbial lama kan Union  hruaitute hian lehkha siamin Cooperation Department Budget hi min tihpun sak turin Mizoram sawrkarah ngenna siam ni se

tih chu lawm taka pawm tlân a ni.

Vawiin hun hmanna hi Pu Joseph Lalhmingthanga Chinzah, DRCS,LADC chuan kaihruaiin, Lawngtlai - Phawngpui MPACS, Siaha MPACS leh Zobawm Lunglei MPACS atang tein hlawhtlinna an chan thu ngaihthlak a ni a.  Pi Elizabeth H. Lalremrluangi, Cooperation Department, LADC chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah PM Surya Ghar chungchang Awareness Campaign buatsaih
content:
590/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 19th May 2026: Power & Electricity Department, Govt. of Mizoram chuan vawiin khan PM SURYA GHAR : MUFT BIJLI YOJANA, Month of Solar chungchangah Awareness Campaign a buatsaih.

He hun hi Sub Headquarter YMA Zawlbuk, Tlangrawt Champhai hman niin Er. PC Lalrawnliana, SDO, Champhai Rural Power Sub Division chuan a kaihruai a, power a kan intodelh theihna turin sawrkar laipui chuan mahni phak tawka solar kan siamchhuah ve theihna tur atan Solar nasa takin a buaipui thu a sawi a, mimalin solar hmanga power an lo siamchhuah te sawrkar ah a hralh theihna tura hmalakna awm te a tarlang. He hunah hian Pu Zohmingsanga, Project Manager, BSP Electricals hnen atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni ve bawk.

Er. Lalremtluanga, EE, Power Project Division, Champhai chuan PMSG : MBY chungchang a lem nen entirin a sawifiah a, PM SURYA GHAR hi Power Department mai bakah Prime Minister Pu Modi-a ngei pawhin a ngaihpawimawh thu a sawi a, khulamah chuan nasa taka an lo kalpui tawh thu a tarlang. PM SURYA GHAR hi Solar hmanga Power lakna niin tunhma zawng aiin Subsidy a that fe zawk thu leh install man pawh a tlem tawh hle tih a sawi a, za zela 50 aia tam mah subsidy ah hian hmuh let theih a nih thu sawiin kum 2027 thleng chauh he Scheme hi kalpui a nih thu thu a sawi bawk.

Kum 2024 ah tlangzarh niin in nuaih 100 chunga bun tur ruahman a ni a, March ni 31, 2027 thleng kalpui a ni dawn a, he Scheme a subsidy hmu tur chuan mimal inah install a ngaih dan leh mimal in ni loah chuan subsidy a awm theih loh thu a sawi tarlang a, Solar thatna leh tangkaina hrang hrang a tarlang nghal.

Champhai ah mi 10 te chuan Power Department ah Solar rooftop hmanga an power dawn te an hralh tawh tih a sawi a, Champhai ah mi 35 te'n he Scheme hi an dil tawh tih tarlangin dil dan tur kalphung leh tih ngai leh tul te a tarlang nghal a, zawh duh neite tan Vendor BSP Electricals, Champhai Vengthlangah zawhchian theih reng a nih thu a sawi bawk. He Scheme hnuai atanga chhungkaw tam thei ang berin Rooftop Solar an hman theihna tura hmalak a nih dan leh a kalphung te chipchiar takin a tarlang a ni.

Awareness Campaign ah hian NGO hrang hrang aiawh bakah Joint VC Champhai North leh South leh Consumer Union atangin an kalkhawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Sialkal Range Development Council (SRDC) Meeting Nei
content:
589/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 19th May, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma khan Sialkal Range Development Council (SRDC) Meeting chu an Chairman Pu F. Rodingliana, MLA Lengteng leh Minister of State ni bawk pisaah neih a ni a, he meeting-ah hian Council member-te pawh an tel a ni.

He Council Meeting hi Pu F. Rodingliana’n kaihruaiin Kum 2026-27 chhunga Sialkal Range hnuaia khaw paruk - Mimbung, Hrianghmun, Kawlbem, Teikhang, Selam leh Vaikhawtlang khuaa hmaasawnna hnathawh tur hrang hrangte leh SRDC area tih hmasawnna tur hrang hrangte sawiho a ni.

Chairman Pu F. Rodingliana chuan Sialkal Range Development Council-in a huam chin tih zauh tuma hmalak mek a nih thu tarlangin tuna khaw ruk bakah hian a chhehvel khua engemaw zat SRDC hnuaiah hian rin luh tum a nih thu tarlangin chhak tlangdung-a Burma ramri hnaiha awm khua te tih hmasawn kawngah Mizoram Sorkar-in nasa takin ngaihtuahna a seng mek a, chumi tur chuan SRDC area zauh mai bakah dan mumal tak hnuaia inrelbawlna a awm theihna turin sorkar-in SRDC manual leh inkaihhruaina dan te a ennawn mek a, heng hi tih puitlin a nih hunah chuan SRDC area a huam chin khua ten nasa takin hma an sawn ngei a beisei thu a sawi a ni. Tin, Chairman hian kumthar lamah chuan SRDC Budget pawh tihpun a nih a beisei thu a tarlang bawk a ni.

He SRDC Council meeting-ah hian Chairman Pu F. Rodingliana, MLA Lengteng bakah member dang Pu H. Ginzalala, MLA Champhai North, SDO Civil, Ngopa, Development Officer, SRDC leh Mimbung, Hrianghmun, Kawlbem, Teikhang, Selam leh Vaikhawtlang VCP theuhte an tel a ni.

title: Nute Ni Pualin Hnahthial District chhunga Nu Chhuanawmte hnenah Chawimawina hlan
content:
588/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 19th May, 2026: Mission Shakti hnuaiah District Hub for Empowerment of Women (DHEW) bultumin vawiin khan DC Meeting Hall-ah fate chawm seilen kawnga nu chhuanawm pahnih - Pi Biakchhungi leh Pi Vanlalliani te chu Hnahthial Bawrhsap, Pi K. Vanlalruati chuan chawimawina thuziak (citation) leh pawisa fai a hlan a. Bawrhsap chuan chawimawina dawngtute bakah Nute ni puala hetiang buatsaih nachang hria, Women & Child Development-te chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi.

Bawrhsap chuan Nu fel leh chhuanawm tak pahnih hnenah chawimawina a hlan thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Pa tel lova fa puitling tak tak an enkawl seilian chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Pi Biakchhungi leh Pi Vanlalliani te chuan an fate chu chawm seilian satliah mai lova mahni inchawm thei, mi puilting tak veka an chhuah chu ropui a tih thu sawiin a dawng tur tak ten chawimawina an dawng ni a a hriat thu a sawi. Hei bakah hian he hun buatsaihtu, Women & Child Development lama thawktute chu fakawm a tih thu sawiin thil tihchhunzawm zel tlak tak ni a a hriat thu a sawi bawk.

Chawimawina dawngtu, Pi Biakchhungi w/o Hrangliana (L) hi Pangzawl Khawngbawk venga mi niin fa sawm leh pakhat (11) a nei a. A fate pahnih hi boral tawhin a pasalin an boral san hnu hian amahin fa pakua (9) hi a rem rem thawk chungin a chawm puitling vek a. A fate hi tunah chuan a then sawrkar hnaah te lutin a thenin dawrte an siam a, anmahniin an intodelh vek tawh a ni.

Chawimawina dawngtu Pi Vanlalliani w/o Biakhmingliana (L) hi Tarpho khua a cheng niin a pasalin a boral san hnu hian a theih theih a inhlawhin a fa panga (5) te chu a chawm seilian a. Tunah chuan a fa upa ber hian High School zirtirtu hna thawk mekin thenkhatin Missionary hna an thawk a, an naupang ber hian computer a zir mek bawk a ni.

Chawimawina hian thuziak (Citation) bakah pawisa fai cheng sang nga (Rs. 5000) a keng tel a ni.

Programme hi Pi F. Lalnuntluangi, Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) kaihhruaina hnuaiah DHEW thawktute nen hman a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP - HOVIN  PI GOSPEL VANLALPANI VANDIR (MIS) LAWMPUINA NEI
content:
587/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 19th May 2026 :Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga hovin  Mizoram Civil Services ( Combined Competitive Examination) 2025 - a Mizoram Inforamtion Service (MIS) a inziak tling Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir lawmpuina a Office Chamber-ah neih a ni. He hunah hian Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir Nu leh Pa, DC Office - a thawk te leh  Mizoram Journalist Association (MJA)Lawngtlai te an  tel thei  a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan thinglung taka Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir a lawmpui thu a sawi a. Hna tha leh zahawm tak thawk turin theihtawp chhuaha beih a ngai thin tih sawiin, a thawhrimna leh inpekna zara hlawhtlinna a chang chu a chhuanawm hle a ni, a ti. Tunah chuan sawrkar mi a nih tawh angin, a thiamna, finna leh thawhrimna chu ram leh mipuite tana hmanga, theihtawp chhuah tura fuihin a kal zelna turah duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Zirlaite tan hlawhtling turin theihtawp chhuah a ngai thin a, hlawhtlinna lo chang tawhte hmem atanga thutawn lakpeih pawh thi tul tak a ni, tiin, entawn tlâk te entawn thiam fo turin a chah a. A bik takin Lawngtlai District atanga mithiam zawk an lo chhuah a, hna tha tak tak an thawh theihna turin District Administration chuan theihtawp a chhuah zel tur thu tarlangin, zirlaite pawh hlawhtlinna chang ngei tura an zirlai hei turin a chah nghal bawk.

Pi Margaret J . Vanlalremmawii SDO (S) chuan DC Office aiawhin  Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir hnenah hian lawmpuina ' Memento ' a hlan a ni.

He hunah hian Pu Lalthangmawia Vandir F/o Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir chuan lawmthu sawina a neiin, rinawm taka kum 30 chuang a lo thawhtawhna department - a lo zawm ve leh chu ropui a tih thu a sawi a. Bawrhsap leh a thawhpuiten a fanu lawmpuina an  buatsaih sak chu ropui a tih thu tarlangin, hmalam hunah bawrhsap leh a thawhpuite duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk a ni. Pu Lalngheta Ralte, Treasurer, MJA, Lawngtlai chuan thutawi sawiin,  Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir lawmpuina MJA hminga an neih tawh thu a tarlang a. Ram leh mipuite tan rawngbawlna  kawngah theihtawp chhuah tura fuihin, MJA - te nen pawha thawhhona tha tak an neih zel a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Attachment

title: KAWLKULHAH PLASTIC WASTE MANAGEMENT UNIT HAWN A NI
content:
586/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 19th May, 2026:Nimin khan Plastic Waste Management Unit (PWMU) Kawlkulha sak chu Pu C Rosangliana, Chairman, WATSAN Committee chuang a hawng a, VC, NGO leh PHED staff engemaw zat an tel a ni.

PWMU hawnna inkhawm hi Khawzawl Sub Divisional Officer, PHED Pu Freddy Vanlalmuanawma chuan kaihruaiin, Pu TBC Lalthangzawna chuan technical report a pe a. PWMU hi Khawzawl block tana ruahman niin SBM (G) 2.0 fund hmanga thawh a ni a, Kawlkulh khua hi in 850 bawr vel niin, Kawlkulh khua bakah a chhehvela khaw hrang hrangten an hman ṭangkai theih tura ruahman niin, WATSAN enkawl chhunzawm tur a ni a, tunah hian user charge in tinah khawn ṭan nghal a nih thu a sawi a. Plastic incinerator leh segregation shed dah niin user fee collection aṭang hian bailing machine leh shredding machine te pawh leichhoh zel tura ruahman a ni, a ti.

He hunah hian bialtu Pu Liantluanga Chohte, Sr. Executive Engineer, PHED Khawzawl chuan Plastic sawngbawlna khawl te hi mipui ten tangkai taka hmang tur leh duat taka enkawl turin a chah a,  sawrkar chauh rinchhan lova, ti hlawhtling tura mipui ten ngaihtuahna bakah kan hun leh tha te kan senral ve angaih thu a sawi a, Khawzawl District khua ten plastic hnawmhnawkte mumal leh him zawka kan senghawi theih nan Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 dung zui zela kan thawh a pawimawh thu kalkhawmte hmaah a sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: DAWMDAWI DAWR KHAR DAWN AVANGA CHIAI LO TURIN MIPUITE CHAH
content:
585/2026-2027

Aizawl, 19th May, 2026 :F.Lalliantluanga, Controlling & Licensing Authority, Directorate of Health Services a hnuaia tarlan ang hian thuchhuah a siam :

All India Organisation of Chemists & Druggists (AIOCD) chuan May 20, 2026 hian rampum huapin Online pharmacy dodal nan leh India rama e-pharmacy pawm a nih loh nan damdawi dawr zawng zawng kharin bandh a huaihawt dawn a. Mizorama damdawi zuarte pawhin he bandh hi zawm ve an tum a ni.

Mizoram FDA chuan mipuite chiai lo turin a chah a. Sawrkar leh Private hospital pharmacy-te hawn a nih dawn avangin hengahte hian mamawh a lam theih reng dawn a ni. Damdawi dawr khar avanga buaina awm thei pumpelh nan hengte hi hriat ni se:

1. Natna benvawn zunthlum, thisen sang, asthma, cancer, etc. nei chuan bandh hma ngeiin mahni damdawi mamawh lo inlam lawk ni se.

2. Emergency-a mamawh theih insulin, inhalers, life-saving drugs leh naupang damdawi mamawh lo ngaihtuah lawk ni bawk se.

3. Nikhat chauh bandh a nih dawn avangin mamawh tawk bak a chuang aliamin eng damdawi mah lei khawl loh ni se.4. Accident leh rikrum thil dang thleng a awmin, hospital hnai ber biak pawh thuai ni se.5. Damdawi zuarte pawh dawr kharin bandh zawm mah se, emergency thila damdawi mamawh a awmin dawr hawnsak hram hram tura ngen leh beisei an ni.

6. Bandh zawm avangin damlo nen emaw, FDA official-te nen emaw inep zawnga kal loh hram hram ni se.

7. FDA Officer-ten an bial enkawl chhungah bandh avanga damdawi mamawh hmuh zawh loh a awm loh nan hma an la vek tur a ni bawk ang.

title: LAWNGTLAI KHAWPUI CHHUNGA LIRTHEI DAN BAWHCHHIA AN TLEM LEH MIPUITE HIM ZAWK NAN A LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP THUCHHUAH
content:
584/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 18th May 2026 :Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga lirthei Dan bawhchhia an lo tlem zawk nan leh mipuite him zawk nan a hnuaia mi ang hian Lawngtlai Bawrhsap chuan thuchhuah a siam.

ORDER

No.J.11013/2/2026- DC (LTI): Stand Up Lawngtlai (Tho Law Dir Tuah) meeting Dt. 08.05.2026 in a rel angin, Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga Lirthei Dan bawhchhia an lo tlem zawk nan leh mipuite kan lo hum tlan zawk nan khapna thupek chhuah tula hriat a ni.

Chuvangin kei, DONNY LALRUATSANGA , MCS, DISTRICT MAGISTRATE, LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT, LAWNGTLAI chuan Section 163 of Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), 2023-thuneihna min pek angin a hnuaia thupek hi ka chhuah e.

1. Mi tumahin Lirthei mihring tana hlauhawm khawpin an khalh tur a ni lo.

2. Dan in a phal chin pel a chak in lirthei an khalh tur a ni lo.

3. Kawngpui leh mipui punkhawmna hmun-ah traffic tibuai zawngin lirthei an dah tur a ni lo.

4. Driving Licence leh documents pawimawh nei lovin lirthei an khalh tur a ni lo.

5. Rui chungin lirthei an khalh tur a ni lo.

6. Lirthei khalh laiin mobile phone an hmang tur a ni lo.

7. Helmet khum lo leh seat belt hreng lovin lirthei an khalh tur a ni lo.

8. Dan bawhchhia a zirin hremna pawisa (penalty) The Motor Vehicles (Amendment) Act, 2019 hmangin Rs. 500 atang Rs. 10,000 thleng chawi tir theih a ni.

He thupek zawm lo te chu Section, 223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) hmangin hrem theih an ni ang.

He thupek hian Lawngtlai District pum a huam anga, thu leh awm hma chu tihchhuah anih atanga thlahnih(2) chhung a huam ang.

He thupek hi vawiin Dt. 15.05.2026 hian District Magistrate Seal- a nemnghetin hming ka ziah hnan e.

Sd/-DONNY LALRUATSANGADistrict MagistrateLawngtlai District, Lawngtlai.
